options.content: Loading…

list.definition:
SELECT COALESCE(MIN(regexp_replace(t.name, '^heart360tk_facility_view_(patients|aggregated)_', '')), '')
FROM "user" u
LEFT JOIN team_member tm ON tm.user_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN team t ON tm.team_id = t.id
WHERE u.id = ${__user.id}
  AND t.name LIKE 'heart360tk_facility_view_%'
  AND t.name NOT LIKE '%_ALL'

list.definition:
SELECT COALESCE((
  SELECT id::text FROM org_units
  WHERE replace(lower(trim(name)), ' ', '_') = '${UserFacilitySlug}'
  LIMIT 1
), '')
list.name: UserFacilityId
